message.body: Press Win + R, type regedit, and press Enter to open the Registry Editor. Navigate to: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\Microsoft Edge Find the NoRemove entry on the right pane. Double-click it and change its value from 1 to 0. Close the Registry Editor and open Control Panel > Programs > Programs and Features. You should now see the "Uninstall" option for Microsoft Edge. Select it and follow the prompts to remove the browser.
